section_miscategorizations.reason: Dizziness is documented explicitly as a patient-reported symptom rather than an observed exam or test result, so it belongs in the HPI rather than the Findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: He has a history of a possible heart attack and skin cancer.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are elements of past medical history rather than the current diagnostic impression. While not grossly misleading in Assessment, they are more appropriately part of the history/HPI context.
